claim_boundary: Benchmark-evidence metadata join only. Geometry groups are descriptive topology labels and never imply a causal failure mechanism; predicate availability is consumed from the #5593 export lane when present and is explicit 'unavailable' otherwise; validated mechanisms require a validated causal report and are not derived here. No private manuscript claims are encoded.
